remarks: An amazing updated home loaded w/ charm, curb appeal and nestled on a quiet cul de sac awaits - Welcome home to 14 Winfield Court. A picturesque front porch greets you and creates an inviting first impression, offering the perfect place to enjoy a morning coffee or unwind at the end of the day. There is so much to love about this cheerful home including hardwood flooring throughout, amazing natural light, solid wood beam ceiling accent in the eat-in kitchen, and fresh paint. The main level provides comfortable living and entertaining spaces, including a spacious living room that opens to the formal dining room and an eat-in kitchen. Both the dining room and eat-in kitchen provide seamless access to the expansive rear deck, creating an effortless indoor-outdoor lifestyle. A convenient partial bath completes the first level. Upstairs, you will find 2 generous sized bedrooms and a beautifully renovated hall bath. Step outside and be pleasantly surprised by how private and expansive this back yard is, your own peaceful escape. The oversized deck, is ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining guests or relaxing while simply enjoying your natural surroundings. Added bonus features to this beautiful home include a detached garage and a lower-level w/ a dedicated laundry area + abundant storage space. Ideally located and a quick walk to the neighborhood "Spot Deli" for convenience and close to dining, parks and transportation. This is the East Norwalk home that you have been waiting for.
